feedback.text: I am writing to respectfully request the inclusion of stronger consumer protections for digital video game purchases. As digital purchases increasingly become the norm in the video game industry, it is vital that legislation keeps pace to protect the rights of consumers. Currently, game publishers have the ability to shut down online servers or render digital games unplayable, despite consumers having paid for full access to these titles. This practice undermines consumer trust, raises questions about ownership rights, and results in financial loss for users who are left with non-functional products.
